natural_language_intent: I'm Wei Zhang, a Financial Risk Analyst at our Shanghai commercial bank. I need to finalize the Q3 credit risk assessment for regulatory submission. Please orchestrate the workflow to synchronize the multiple services so they start in the correct order without conflicts, then create custom graphics or illustrations for the risk distribution charts in the presentation deck. Finally, ensure the final archive is securely transferred by mounting the network file systems to our AWS cloud storage via the gateway tunnel so the compliance team can access it immediately.

persona.name: Wei Zhang
persona.work_context: Assessing loan portfolios for a Shanghai commercial bank.

domains.name: automation-flow
domains.description: This domain orchestrates scheduled tasks, UI interactions, and deterministic workflow executions across the system. It manages cron jobs, controls desktop nodes, renders visual canvases, and enforces approval gates for critical steps. Operators use this to automate repetitive maintenance cycles or trigger complex workflows requiring human oversight. It binds together time-based events, visual interfaces, and logic gates into cohesive operational flows.

selected_tasks.name: Modify Canvas Widget
selected_tasks.description: Change the layout or content of a specific visual element.

domains.name: multimedia
domains.description: This domain handles the generation, capture, playback, and conversion of all forms of digital media content. It includes tools for generating images, processing video streams, capturing camera feeds, and converting text to speech for audio output. Scenarios range from creating media assets for reports to controlling home speakers or recording screen clips. It empowers the agent to interact with the physical world through visual and auditory outputs.

selected_tasks.name: Adjust Speaker Volume
selected_tasks.description: Set the volume level for the connected audio speaker system.

selected_tasks.name: Generate Graphic Design
selected_tasks.description: Create custom graphics or illustrations for presentations and reports.

domains.name: system-infrastructure
domains.description: This domain maintains the underlying network, security, and cloud connectivity required for stable agent operation. It includes tools for managing secure tunnels, mounting network file systems, invoking gateway services, and accessing cloud storage via AWS. Infrastructure engineers rely on these to configure secure routes, monitor deployed versions, and compress data archives. It ensures the environment is robust, connected, and capable of handling sensitive data transfers securely.

selected_tasks.name: Retrieve Bootstrap Package
selected_tasks.description: Download initial setup files needed to get the system running.

selected_tasks.name: Coordinate Service Startup
selected_tasks.description: Synchronize multiple services so they start in the correct order without conflicts.

natural_language_intent: I’m finalizing the deployment package for the latest perception module and need to orchestrate the preparation steps across the environment. Start by generating a comprehensive validation script in the local workspace directory that ingests the recent inference logs and computes our standard latency and accuracy benchmarks. Before I commit the changes, apply a structured patch to the existing model configuration to enable mixed-precision inference, and render the unified diff so I can review the specific parameter shifts. Once approved, switch the active repository state to the release/v3.2 branch, stage the new validation tools and config updates, and initialize a pull request with a summary of the performance gains. Finally, hook this into the automation flow to trigger a real-time dashboard refresh on the engineering monitor whenever the build completes successfully.

persona.name: Aarav Sharma
persona.work_context: Remote team collaborating on autonomous vehicle software.

domains.name: file-io
domains.description: This domain handles fundamental file system interactions including creating, modifying, and analyzing local file contents. It supports direct text editing, structured patch application, and unified diff rendering to visualize changes. Typical scenarios involve updating configuration files, reviewing code modifications, or extracting data from storage formats. This serves as the core interface for persistent storage operations outside of version control systems.

selected_tasks.name: Preview Modification Impact
selected_tasks.description: Show how file edits will look before finalizing the changes.

selected_tasks.name: Create New Document
selected_tasks.description: Generate a new file with specified content in the workspace directory.

domains.name: source-chain
domains.description: This domain orchestrates version control operations and development environment synchronization using Git and GitHub tools. It enables repository cloning, pull request management, automated build watching, and dependency installation via modern package managers. Developers utilize this for maintaining project integrity, syncing remote branches, and automating build cycles. It ensures the workspace remains aligned with external code repositories and build artifacts.

selected_tasks.name: Switch Development Branch
selected_tasks.description: Change the active working line of code to a different feature or release branch.

selected_tasks.description: Configure settings for how alerts are delivered to the user.

selected_tasks.name: Update Dashboard On Event
selected_tasks.description: Refresh the visual board when a new data point arrives.

natural_language_intent: Hey everyone, I'm back at my desk here in HCMC and ready to wrap up the Q3 transaction cleanup. Can you dig up the conversation log from our last session yesterday so I can see which SQL stored procedures we finalized for anomaly detection? Once you have that context, please spawn a new sub-agent to execute those queries against the raw dataset and clean up the outliers. After the analysis is done, make sure all the updated Python scripts and the final findings are committed to the main branch on our GitHub repo via source-chain, pushing the latest version tag too. Finally, generate a concise markdown report summarizing the data quality improvements so I can paste it into the stakeholder email.

persona.name: Linh Nguyen
persona.work_context: Fintech office in Ho Chi Minh City

domains.name: agent-memory
domains.description: This domain governs the state, context, and inter-session communication of autonomous agents. It provides capabilities to spawn sub-agents, retrieve historical session logs, manage persistent memory entries, and transfer information between active sessions. Scenarios include debugging long-running tasks, retrieving past decisions, or coordinating multi-agent workflows. It ensures continuity and context preservation across distributed agent operations.

selected_tasks.name: Review Session History
selected_tasks.description: Retrieve the conversation log for a past session to understand what transpired.

selected_tasks.name: Delegate Complex Analysis
selected_tasks.description: Assign a heavy workload to a spawned agent and await the final report.

natural_language_intent: I need to finalize a safety compliance audit for our SMT robot cells before the next shift change. Start by extracting the latest ISO 10218 guidelines specifically for collaborative robotics in high-density electronics assembly from reliable technical sources. Then, query my past agent memory logs to retrieve any previous risk assessments or configuration overrides logged for these specific cells over the last quarter. Based on that analysis, synchronize the local workspace by cloning the master branch of our PLC automation repository, installing all required dependencies for the validation suite, and preparing a dedicated branch for the proposed logic updates. Ultimately, I require a structured report comparing the new regulations against our historical data entries, along with a verified local environment ready for unit testing the updated safety interlocks.

persona.name: Nguyen Thi Lan
persona.work_context: Electronics factory in Ho Chi Minh City

Analysts use these tools to gather competitive intelligence, verify online data, or scrape relevant information for processing. It serves as the bridge between the agent's internal logic and external public information sources.
